description: 565h+ simplified annotation mode. Annotators only label chassis type and B/C/D quality flags. Task and subtask metadata are intentionally not saved.

cpu.label: cpu_pick
cpu.prompt: pick up the cpu and move it towards the insertion slot

cpu.label: cpu_insert
cpu.prompt: place the cpu into insertion slot

cpu.label: cpu_lever1
cpu.prompt: install the first cpu locking lever

cpu.label: cpu_lever2
cpu.prompt: install the second cpu locking lever

disk.label: disk_insert
disk.prompt: insert the disk into the insertion slot

gpu.label: gpu_pick
gpu.prompt: pick up the gpu and move the gpu toward the slot

gpu.label: gpu_insert
gpu.prompt: insert the gpu into the slot

gpu.label: gpu_press
gpu.prompt: press down on the gpu until it lock into place

ram.label: ram_pick
ram.prompt: pick up the ram and move it above insertion slot

ram.label: ram_insert
ram.prompt: insert the ram into the slot

ram.label: ram_press1
ram.prompt: press down the ram on one side until it locks into place

ram.label: ram_press2
ram.prompt: press down the ram on the other side until it locks into place

ram2.label: ram2_pick
ram2.prompt: pick up the second ram and move it above second insertion slot

ram2.label: ram2_insert
ram2.prompt: insert the second ram into the second slot

ram2.label: ram2_press1
ram2.prompt: press down the second ram on one side until it locks into place

ram2.label: ram2_press2
ram2.prompt: press down the second ram on the other side until it locks into place

canonical_rule: If task_mode is overall, task_name = object. If task_mode is fragment, task_name is the selected subtask_name combination, e.g. cpu_insert_cover.
